description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa set featuring a dark gray fabric upholstery with a subtle woven texture. The set includes two matching sofas, each with straight, clean lines and track armrests that are level with the backrest. The seating area is furnished with multiple loose cushions in two colors: light gray and muted blue, arranged symmetrically for both comfort and visual contrast. The sofas rest on short, exposed wooden legs with a natural finish, providing a slight elevation from the ground. The backrests are straight and medium-height, supporting several plush back cushions. The overall design is contemporary and functional, suitable for urban outdoor or indoor environments such as parks, lobbies, or communal spaces.
description: A pair of modern, dark gray sofas with straight lines, track armrests, and contrasting blue and gray cushions, elevated on short wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the full arrangement of cushions and the straight, track armrests.
description_view_1: Opposite front and side view highlighting the symmetry of the cushion arrangement and the exposed wooden legs.
description_view_2: Rear and side view displaying the continuous, straight backrest and the uniformity of the sofa backs.
description_view_3: Rear and partial side view emphasizing the backrest height and the clean, uninterrupted lines of the sofa backs.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Each sofa has three large seat cushions and five loose back cushions, with the back cushions arranged in a row and varying in color between blue and light gray. All cushions are individual, loose, and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Armrests are present, straight, and at the same height as the backrest, with a squared, track profile and no visible decorative elements or padding contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Each sofa has four short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, made of wood with a natural finish and slightly exposed beneath the frame.
attribute_backrest_type: The backrest is medium-height, straight, and continuous across the width of each sofa, supporting several loose back cushions without tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid dark gray with a subtle woven fabric texture, no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
